meta_description: For high quality and affordable removals Epsom - Mark Ratcliffe Moving offer a complete moving and storage service to clients across Epsom and throughout Surrey. Having worked in the industry for more than 30 years, providing local & national moves to domestic and commercial clients.

raw_body:
EMAIL US

Complete Removals Epsom and Surrey

At Mark Ratcliffe Moving & Storage we offer a comprehensive moving and storage service. Having worked in the industry for more than 30 years, you can place your trust in our team to look after your move.

How can we help you today?

Moving Home or relocating your offices? We can make your journey as 'Smooth as Silk'

Choosing the right removal company to look after your move and take care of your possessions is an important decision. You need to know you have secured good value for money, but also be confident that the team arriving on the morning will understand your requirements properly and have both the training and equipment necessary to ensure a successful and straightforward move.

Mark Ratcliffe founded Mark Ratcliffe Moving & Storage and has been working in the UK commercial and domestic removals and storage market for over 30 years. Working with both residents and businesses across Epsom and throughout Surrey, quality is, and has always been, at the core of everything we do. Our removal firm are one of just a handful with a dedicated staff training centre and all of our staff are trained to the highest industry standards. Staff are trained and experienced in packing fragile and non-fragile personal effects, moving and wrapping household furniture for home and overseas moving, as well as vehicle loading and customer services. With our moving firm you can expect the highest standards, competitive prices and a real commitment from everyone involved in your move.

Removals Epsom - Choose a moving company you can trust 

At Mark Ratcliffe Moving & Storage we not only deal in removals but offer a complete moving service. Whether you have a 3 piece suite to move across the town, or need assistance with packing, storage or house clearance, we are equipped with the necessary equipment, staff and skill to move you with ease. Our team of professionals are also well placed to help and advise on all of your moving needs.

At the start of your moving journey with us, Mark Ratcliffe will visit your home at a convenient time to carry out an onsite survey and discuss all aspects of your forthcoming move. Packing requirements, insurance cover for your possessions and house clearance can be discussed, with a fixed quotation provided for moving, packing and storage if required. On your move day a fully trained and uniformed crew will arrive and lay down floor covers to protect carpets, cover exposed banisters and doors etc. If required, they will pack and move your belongings with care and transport them safely to your new home in Epsom or further afield.

Professional Packing Epsom

We offer a full packing service or packing of fragile items only. Should you decide to carry out your own packing prior to move day, we provide flat pack moving boxes, plain paper, bubble wrap, tape etc...all at a minimal cost.

Affordable Self Storage   

Mark Ratcliffe Moving & Storage also offer secure self storage rooms to rent for customers and businesses who prefer to deposit / remove their own goods to / from store. We have a variety of different sized rooms available with our most popular size being 77 sqft which equates to 850 cubic feet / 24 cubic metres. This size room is rented at £30 plus vat per week and with our storage rooms being much higher than our local competitors and our charges being over 50% less than the rest - they are extremely good value. Your valuable possessions will be stored in a secure, damp free and clean environment and you will be the only key holder with great access for loading / unloading.

Whether you are moving within Epsom or further afield in the UK, or even abroad, Mark Ratcliffe Moving & Storage is ready to help. We can meet all of your wider moving needs including secure storage, export packing and house clearance. We would be delighted to give you a quote for removals in Epsom without any obligation. Please contact our team today to talk through your moving requirements. Our opening hours are Mon - Sat 08.30 - 17.00 or by appointment for any other time including Sundays. A 24/7 Service for our Self Store Customers.
